name: github_list_marketplace_accounts_for_plan
description: GET /marketplace_listing/plans/{plan_id}/accounts — list accounts for a Marketplace plan. Optional sort created|updated and direction asc|desc. Requires GitHub App JWT or OAuth app basic auth. Pagination: page, per_page 1-100 default 100; all_pages and max_pages.

plan_id.description: The unique identifier of the plan.

sort.description: Property to sort by (created default, or updated).

direction.description: Sort direction. Ignored without the sort parameter.
